posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! My team is working on an advanced integration between monday.com and shopify that will be:

  • Easier to setup then make.com or Zapier
  • Less expensive than make.com or Zapier
  • More detailed/advanced than existing integrations.
  • Available in the new monday.com ‘workflow builder’ feature as well as monday board automations.

You can join the growing waitlist here for early access. Thanks in advance!
